title: bomarea × cantabrigiensis
intro: Bomarea × cantabrigiensis, also known as the Cambridge Bomarea, is a hybrid plant species in the Alstroemeriaceae family, resulting from the cross between Bomarea edulis and Bomarea salsilla. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Bomarea × cantabrigiensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function and overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Bomarea × cantabrigiensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
